# together_beta_cluster_storage (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "together_beta_cluster_storage" "example_beta_cluster_storage" {
  volume_id = "volume_id"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `volume_id` (String) The ID of the volume to retrieve

### Read-Only

- `size_tib` (Number) Size of the volume in whole tebibytes (TiB).
- `status` (String) Deployment status of the volume.
Available values: "available", "bound", "provisioning".
- `volume_name` (String) Provided name of the volume.
